requestedBody: The front desk has been notified. Thank you for staying with us.
overviewBody: Review your stay details and settle your bill before checking out.
noOnlinePayment: Online payments aren't set up for this hotel yet — please settle at the front desk.
balanceSettled: Your balance is settled. You can request checkout below.
settleToCheckout: Please settle your balance to enable checkout
needAssistance: Need any assistance? Call Front Desk at

errors.pendingBalanceHint: Please settle your remaining balance before checking out.
errors.checkoutFailed: Checkout failed. Please contact the front desk.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred during checkout.
errors.paymentCancelled: Payment cancelled. You can retry below.
